theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium organic food hall, sustainable, approachable, tactile.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Patients/subscribers need warmth and trust. A dining app should feel appetizing and physical, not like a cold, generic SaaS tool. We are utilizing earthy greens and terracotta to stimulate appetite and denote health/freshness.

typography.anti_pattern_check: Inter, Roboto, and generic sans-serifs are banned for headings.
typography.usage_rules: Headings must always use Cabinet Grotesk with tight tracking. Use Manrope for high-legibility body copy and data tables.

color_system.description: The palette revolves around Warm Sand (Background), Moss Green (Primary), and Terracotta/Clay (Secondary/Accents). No pure blacks (#000) or pure grays; all neutrals are tinted warmly.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2x more padding than standard UI. Borders must have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Center-align only major marketing hero headings.

surface_and_materials.primary_surface: Neumorphism & Tactile Edge. Cards use pure white (or off-white) on sand background, with a crisp 1px border-black/5 and a soft shadow-sm.
surface_and_materials.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 with a 1px border-b border-black/5.
surface_and_materials.ticket_pass_ui: For the Subscriber QR pass, use a custom component with dashed borders (border-dashed) in the middle to simulate a tear-off ticket. Add a subtle drop-shadow.

subscriber_dashboard.hero_element: Digital Meal Pass. A large, ticket-style card taking up 60vh on mobile. Prominent QR code in the center. Large typography indicating '30 Meals Remaining'.
subscriber_dashboard.supporting_elements: Horizontal scroll list for 'Today's Menu', and a history list for 'Recent Check-ins'.

staff_scanner.hero_element: Camera viewport taking up 70% of the screen. Dark overlay with a transparent scanning square and four corner brackets in Moss Green.
staff_scanner.supporting_elements: A prominent bottom sheet containing 'Manual Entry' and 'Recent Scans'. High contrast for visibility in brightly lit canteens.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
admin_dashboard.hero_element: Top row summary widgets (col-span-1 each): Total Subs, Active Today, Revenue. Second row: Large line chart for 'Attendance Trends' (col-span-3), 'Recent Logs' feed (col-span-1).
admin_dashboard.visual_vibe: Clear, data-dense but breathable. Uses earth tones for charts instead of default blue/red.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a shadow-lg. Buttons must explicitly change background and text color.
motion_and_interactions.qr_interactions: The QR ticket should use a Framer Motion 3D flip (rotateY) to reveal subscription details/history on the back.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade and slight slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0) on load for dashboard elements.

component_strategies.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI forms. Inputs must have rounded-xl borders, subtle focus rings (ring-moss-green), and soft backgrounds.
component_strategies.tables: Admin tables should be cardless, with border-b only between rows to maintain an open, clean look.
component_strategies.charts: Recharts inside Shadcn chart wrapper. Use Moss Green and Terracotta for data lines. Hide grid lines on X-axis for a cleaner look.

hero_marketing.description: Warm modern dining hall, use for landing page hero background with a 40% white overlay.

food_display_1.description: Healthy gourmet lunch bowl, use for the 'Today's Menu' or subscription plan feature image.

food_display_2.description: Colorful poke bowl, use for secondary marketing imagery or meal selection previews.

staff_avatar.description: Professional chef/staff portrait, use for the Staff or Admin user profile avatar.

qr_scan_example.description: Phone displaying a QR code, use for 'How it works' section on the marketing page.

media_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Prefer soft, rounded stroke styles (strokeWidth 1.5). For organic aesthetics, do not use heavily filled or sharp icons.

testing_guidelines.required_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields, QR codes, meal balances) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='qr-ticket-card', data-testid='admin-login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette (Moss Green, Terracotta, Warm Sand) defined in CSS variables.
Do not use generic blue/purple default Tailwind templates.
Ensure the Subscriber Dashboard focuses heavily on the 'Ticket Pass' UI element (dashed borders, centered QR code).
Staff scanner page should be dark mode for visibility/glare reduction.
Always apply data-testid to UI interactive elements.
Use the provided image URLs as actual src paths, absolutely no placeholder services.
